pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v1.3.4; c-PCR-003 Concrete, concrete elements (EN 16757:2023)
lca_tool: GCCA's Industry EPD Tool for Cement and Concrete v4.2, International version
scope: A1-A3 + A4-A5 + B1-B7 + C1-C4 + D, cradle-to-grave
notes: Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 = 145 kg CO2e); source's module table (p18) has a single 'A1-A3' column with no A1/A2/A3 split → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.

Unlike most EPDs in this corpus, B1-B7 (use stage) are fully declared here, not ND: the module-scope table (p10) marks every module A1-D with 'X'. B1 = -3.17 kg CO2e is a real recarbonation credit during use (GCCA tool default, p8); B2-B7 = 0 are genuine declared zeros because the scenario assumes no maintenance/repair/replacement occurs (p10 text), not a not-declared gap.

No compressive-strength test standard (e.g. AS 1379) is stated anywhere in the document — p8 references AS 3600:2018 only for the reference-service-life exposure class, not for strength grading — so compressive_strength.standard is recorded as null rather than inferred.

Location: p17 summary field 'Production site(s)' just says 'Brisbane'; the specific plants supplying this project-specific EPD are named on p8 ('Concrete plants in the study include: Jindalee, Coopers Plains, Ipswich') — used as sites[] here.

This is a project-specific EPD for the Hutchinson Builders – Woolworths Doolandella project (QLD-Brisbane, p1/p22); GE322LPF2 is the specific mix declared by this EPD (registration EPD-IES-0014785:001).

p20 contains a comparison appendix listing 17 sibling mixes from the same project, each with its own separate EPD registration number (e.g. GE322LPE8 = EPD-IES-0014784:001) — these are distinct EPD documents, not additional products declared within this file. The GE322LPF2 row there (32 MPa, A1-A3=145, 'Full Lifecycle GWP-tot'=167) corroborates the p18 figures: summing all modules A1-A3..D from p18 (145+3.41+10.1-3.17+8.99+9.03+5.19+2.85-14.1) = 167.3 ≈ 167; note the source's own 'full lifecycle' figure sums module D into the total, which this record does not replicate (D is stored separately per schema and never summed).

verification: p22's ISO 14025 verification-type checkboxes ('EPD process certification' / 'EPD verification') render as unchecked boxes with a stray 'x' mark displaced to the end of the page by PDF text extraction, so the checked box can't be confirmed by position alone. Inferred as 'process-certification' from the named certifying body ('Process EPD Certified By: Megan Blizzard, Epsten Group, Inc., A2LA #3142.03') — same verifier/org as IES-0029695, which uses the same type.
No EN 15804+A1/CML alternate-methodology table present in this document → gwp_a1a3_alt omitted.

total_energy_use_kwh_a1a3 omitted — source reports PERT/PENRT (MJ) separately on p18 with no single combined kWh total. net_freshwater_use_m3_a1a3 (2.14) taken directly from the 'NFW' (Net use of fresh water, m³) row, already in m³, no conversion needed.
Single product declared in this EPD (no products[] array needed).
